title: callilepis lancifolia
intro: Callilepis lancifolia, also known as wild lettuce or bitter lettuce, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a sedative, reduce inflammation, and relieve pain. The health benefits of Callilepis lancifolia include its potential to improve sleep quality, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
